card1.title: DIY Fatigue
card1.pain: You tried Apollo, Instantly, Lemlist, or similar tools — and outbound still underperformed after months of trial.
card1.solution: Growth Automation replaces fragile DIY outbound with a fully managed agentic outbound engine. We handle audience build, infrastructure, messaging, execution, and qualification — so your team gets full campaign visibility and qualified conversations, not operational headaches.
card1.short: You didn't fail at outbound. Your infrastructure failed you.

card2.title: Agency Priced-Out
card2.pain: You need outbound, but paying $8,000–$15,000/month for a traditional agency doesn't make sense.
card2.solution: Growth Automation gives you a fully managed outbound program with guaranteed qualified leads. You get the infrastructure, execution, AI systems, and human qualification layer — without agency overhead.

card3.title: Lean Sales Team
card3.pain: Your company needs inbound but your sales team is lean, and they can't afford to waste time chasing weak leads or managing 5+ pieces of software.
card3.solution: Growth Automation helps lean teams scale pipeline without adding SDR headcount. We run outbound, qualify interest, and deliver better-fit opportunities so your reps stay focused on closing.
card3.short: More pipeline. Less headcount. Less wasted rep time.
